question.content: In triangle ABC, ACDE is folded along DE to AFDE, with angle BFC=90 deg, EF parallel AB, AB=4*sqrt(3), and EF=10. Find only the length AE. Answer format requirement: <expr>. Strictly forbidden: any extra text beyond this format.
